leadText: The Point Card (Japanese: ポイントカード Point Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Diamond and Pearl , Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl the Point Card holds the Battle Points the player earns from winning battles in the Battle Tower . In Pokémon Platinum , HeartGold, and SoulSilver , the player instead tracks their Battle Points on the Vs. Recorder 's Frontier Record .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A card that lists the Battle Points you have earned. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card that lists how many Battle Points you have earned.
